name: control-finish-until-done
default_program:
[stages: evaluate>read>improve>verify>loop>audit |
 scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,craft-clarity,loop-until-done,approval-gates{blockers-only} |
 lens: craft-clarity |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: MISSION_GOAL
required_inputs.description: One bounded non-code mission to drive to completion.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Exact scope the mission is allowed to touch.

required_inputs.name: DONE_CONDITION
required_inputs.description: Explicit completion contract. Each condition must be reader-verifiable — no vibe-based success language.

required_inputs.name: CURRENT_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Observations, review notes, or prior pass results. When absent, reads TARGET_SCOPE to build initial state.

required_inputs.name: MAX_PASSES
required_inputs.description: Safety ceiling for passes in one turn. Default: 5.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Scope, audience, tone, or non-goal constraints.
